name: Cinnamon Apple Fruit Stix
recipeIngredient: 24 oz Jar MOTTS Cinnamon Apple Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F (120°C).
2. Line a jelly roll pan with plastic wrap and secure the ends with tape.
3. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
5. Bake at 250°F (120°C) for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven.
7. Let stand in the oven for 2 to 3 hours until dry.
8. Carefully remove plastic wrap.
9. Roll up the jelly roll into 8 snacks.
Tip: For ease in spreading, place another piece of plastic wrap on top of the apple sauce mixture; spread evenly with a knife. Remove the top piece of plastic wrap before baking.
